post_apply_actions.detail: Custom values are pre-populated with DRG Law placeholder values from the snapshot. Verify each value reflects the live DRG Law configuration: calendar URLs, portal URLs, intake URL, firm contact details, compliance URLs.

P4 (intake forms + CaseLoad Screen widget) and P5 (workflows J0–J12, Recovery A/B) remain parked pending CaseLoad Screen webhook URL from deployed endpoint. Complete these phases and re-run dynamic P8 QA scenarios after deployment.

phase9_status: COMPLETE — snapshot exported and pushed to DRG Law. GHL processing in background.
build_sequence_status: Phases P1–P3, P6–P9 COMPLETE. P4, P5, dynamic P8 QA BLOCKED pending CaseLoad Screen webhook URL.
next_phase: P10 — Post-apply verification in DRG Law sub-account: confirm all assets present, delete _API_TEST template, clear demo pipeline, verify custom values resolve correctly.
